prompt: Add real-time notifications when someone replies in the community.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
A reply means she is not alone in the money conversation — that’s the belonging beat.

Not every pause needs a ping. Silence can be sacred; growth-style notification spam would hollow calm courage. The signal should feel like a hand on the shoulder, not a scoreboard. Notifications serve formation (“you were heard”), not retention metrics.

If we add realtime, it has to serve that meaning — or we shouldn’t add it.
